finding_title: Dynamic oracle factory calldata can be silently corrupted by overwriting the tail word with a deterministic salt
summary: Silo Enterprise continuous audit 报告中，oracle factory calldata 的最后 32 bytes 被写入 deterministic salt；若 calldata 布局含 dynamic tail data，该写入会静默覆盖动态数据，部署出错误 oracle 配置。K2/Soroban 可类比检查 Address/BytesN/Vec 编码、salt、factory init args 与 oracle config 的边界。
root_cause: factory initialization logic mutates the last calldata word without proving that the word is a reserved salt field rather than dynamic oracle configuration data
broken_invariants: oracle factory initialization must preserve every semantic config field supplied by the caller
deterministic deployment salts must not alias dynamic calldata tail data
attack_preconditions: oracle/factory 接受 caller-supplied encoded config
编码布局中存在 dynamic bytes/vector/string 或可变长尾部
attacker_capability: market creator or configurer able to choose oracle factory calldata layout and parameters
trigger_actions: supply dynamic oracle factory calldata whose tail contains semantic config
factory overwrites the tail with salt during deployment
deployed oracle uses corrupted config in pricing paths

impact.description: oracle may be deployed with silently corrupted parameters, causing wrong prices or unusable markets

why_not_higher: 通常需要市场创建/配置权限且影响依赖具体 oracle 参数；默认 Medium。
why_not_lower: 错误发生在 oracle 配置源头，可能影响清算、借贷额度和市场可用性。
common_false_positive_angles: 如果 init args 是固定结构且最后 32 bytes 明确预留给 salt，则不成立
如果配置权限完全可信且市场上线前有独立验证，通常降级为治理/配置风险
mitigations: 使用标准 factory interface 显式传 salt；避免原地修改任意 calldata；部署后验证 oracle config 与预期完全一致。

snippets.note: PDF: dynamic oracle calldata overwritten by deterministic salt Medium finding
